Analyze the frequency domain representation of signals using Fourier concepts
Classify the systems based on their properties and determine the response of LTI Systems.
Know the sampling process and various types of sampling techniques.
Apply Laplace and z-transforms to analyze signals and Systems (continuous & discrete).

course_outcomes: Explain the historical background and democratic importance of the Indian Constitution
Explain the functions of the executive, legislative and judicial branches of government
Relate fundamental rights and duties to responsible citizenship
Analyze the decentralization of power across central, state and local government
Explain how constitutional institutions such as the CAG, Election Commission and UPSC sustain democracy
